auth.title: Flatlord
auth.googleNote: Google OAuth (Supabase Auth) — invited accounts only.
auth.magicLinkNote: You will get a one-time sign-in link by email — no password needed.
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email for the sign-in link.
auth.privateNote: Private app: no self-signup. Your account is created by the owner; a tenant sees only their own tenancy.
auth.roleNote: After sign-in, role decides the interface: tenant → portal · owner → admin.
auth.errorNotInvited: This account doesn't have a valid invite.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong signing in. Please try again.

invites.createdNote: Invite created — tell {email} to sign in with that exact email address (Google or the magic link) as {role}. No password or code needed.
invites.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

statements.title: Statements
statements.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

backup.heading: Backup & export
backup.description: Download a copy of all data in this app as a zip file (JSON and CSV per table). This is a data export, not a full disaster-recovery backup — it doesn't include login accounts, so restoring it would mean re-inviting users afterward.

meterReadings.photoUploadError: Photo upload failed, please try again
meterReadings.errorBelowPrevious: Lower than the previous reading ({previous}). Check the photo, or contact the owner if the meter was replaced.
meterReadings.reviewNote: After submission the owner verifies the values — only verified readings enter the statement.
meterReadings.submitSuccessBody: The owner has been notified; the monthly statement is drafted after verification.
meterReadings.partialSubmitError: Some meters failed to submit: {failedLabels}. The rest were saved — please retry the failed ones.
meterReadings.overrideNote: Editing the value records an override (entered ≠ confirmed) in the audit log.
meterReadings.keyboardHint: ↵ verify · E edit · R retake · ↑↓ switch meter
meterReadings.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
